name: Agon (Queen's Guard)
author: Traditional (1842) / AGP port
description: A 19th-century race game on a hexagonal board of hexagons. Escort your Queen to the central throne and ring her with all six Guards — moving only inward or sideways, never away from the centre. A piece sandwiched between two enemies is captured and must be re-entered on the outer ring. Wall the throne with guards but leave your queen out and you forfeit.
